objective: Strategie de Momentum sur 0GUSDC 30m. Indicateurs : MACD (histogram), ATR. Entree short quand MACD histogram decroissant et negatif. Stop-loss = 1.5x ATR, take-profit = 3.0x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining MACD histogram and ATR can identify momentum shifts in the market, which is a leading indicator for price movements.
